About

Hometown Country Rock Built For Any Stage

2025Est.
40+Live Shows
15+Cities

The Good N' Rowdy Band is an up-and-coming five-piece country rock group from Central Illinois. We play country, southern rock, barroom favorites, and original music at bars, festivals, parties, and events across the region and beyond.

Inspired By

Inspired By

The Good N' Rowdy Band is an up-and-coming five-piece country rock group from Central Illinois. We play country, southern rock, barroom favorites, and original music at bars, festivals, parties, and events across the region and beyond.

  • Nov 8, 2025Levee Park AmphitheatreEast Peoria, IL
  • Feb 27, 2026Cadillac JacksBloomington, IL
  • Mar 6, 2026CrusensPeoria, IL
